title: skip_number_b has no direct unit tests; existing skip_number_* tests go through char-based path
description: Tests named skip_number_* (e.g. skip_number_bare_exponent_rejected, skip_number_no_fractional_digits_rejected) all call extract_field which routes through the char-based json_extract_string_field parser, NOT through skip_number_b. The byte-level skip_number_b is exercised only indirectly through extract_path tests that use numeric values. A regression in skip_number_b would pass all existing skip_number_* tests. Fix: add direct tests calling json_find_value_b with numeric values as non-target fields, or add direct tests for skip_value_b on numeric inputs.
